findings.description: Missing responsive breakpoint class on Dialog - Dialog uses max-w-md but lacks mobile-specific width class for clarity
Title truncation may hide critical information - Book title has truncate class which may cut off long titles without tooltip
Missing hover state on cover image container - Cover lacks interactive feedback despite being visual focal point
Inconsistent section label styling - Section labels use uppercase tracking which may reduce readability
Empty tags section renders nothing - When book has no tags, entire section is absent (not even empty state message)
File size formatting could be more consistent - Returns em dash but format differs from other fields
Magic number in cover image dimensions - Cover dimensions w-32 h-48 not extracted to constant

strengths: Zero hardcoded colors - all use theme tokens
Proper ARIA attributes and semantic HTML
Good fallback handling for missing metadata
Appropriate use of shadcn/ui Dialog component
